title: Mario Paint Composer - Nitro Man (Megaman 10 Trailer)
description:
I started this right after Levus uploaded his MIDI track. Stopped about halfway through, and of course in the meantime another good chap has gone and uploaded his own version which isn't even all that different.

I'm uploading this out of boredom, I guess.
